companyNameJapanese: 株式会社レゾナック・ホールディングス
description: Comprehensive chemical company providing semiconductor materials including high-purity gases, functional chemicals, epoxy encapsulants, die bonding materials, and hard disks. Formerly Showa Denko K.K.

_externalRelationships.notes: Global #1 semiconductor materials supplier (excl. Si wafer). #1 in SiC epitaxial wafers. Pursuing 'open innovation' for next-gen semiconductors.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, CNBC, Bloomberg, Resonac IR
_metadata.notes: Name changed from Showa Denko K.K. in January 2023. 10 analysts rate Buy. SiC epi-wafer adopted in Toyota LEXUS RZ. Formed from Showa Denko + Hitachi Chemical merger.
